description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build - Release that builds and releases a project on multiple platforms. The workflow should trigger on workflow dispatch and on release publication. For each platform (linux-x64, linux-armhf, linux-aarch64, win-x64, osx-x64, osx-aarch64), checkout the code, populate environment variables, build and package the project, and upload the artifacts. Additionally, create a release with the uploaded artifacts and their corresponding SHA256 checksums.
